title: Excalibur | Amendments Support
description: A visual overhaul for cozy lights and occult decorations!
body:
![Mod's Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c6d83ac44ee0c31cfcd52df3f484f89960b031d.png)
**IMPORTANT:** Make sure to disable the “Pixel Consistent” option in the in-game settings.
You can find it under Amendments → Client → Sign. Turn it off, because if it stays enabled, all signs are rendered as block models instead of entities, which forces the use of vanilla textures that can’t be overridden.
It also causes signs from mods like Farmer’s Delight to become invisible, so it’s important to switch it off.

This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Features:**
- Includes retextured wall lanterns, double cakes (as well as eating progress), custom hanging signs models, candles on top of skulls, etc.

For the best experience, use this pack alongside Excalibur.

**Credits:**
- Maffhew – Creator of _Excalibur_
- MehVahdJukaar – Creator of _Amendments_
- GrandPappyJay	– For fixing the cake models, Pastry Chef Expert Badge

If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰

[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-amendments)
